description: Correct payload binding (§51.0.B.1). Dragging(id: number) is bound via the bare-attribute positional form <Dragging id rule=.Idle> — exactly one binding for one field, the local name in scope in the :-shorthand body's ${id} interpolation. None of the three payload-binding diagnostics fire.
rationale: §51.0.B.1 a single positional binding matching the variant's one payload field is a well-formed binding, in scope throughout the state-child body; no payload diagnostic fires.
